zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Basset於1372年8月1日出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾卡素 白坦時，她的父親Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote57歲，母親Alice de Driby32歲。她與Richard Grey結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1451年8月6日在英國英格蘭德比夏爾可德諾享年79歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Basset于1372年8月1日出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾卡素 白坦时，她的父亲Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote57岁，母亲Alice de Driby32岁。她与Richard Grey结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1451年8月6日在英国英格兰德比夏爾可德諾享年79岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯坦福。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Basset was born on 1 August 1372, in Castle Bytham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote, was 57 and her mother, Alice de Driby, was 32. She married Richard Grey. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 6 August 1451, in Codnor, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79, and was buried in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Basset est née le 1 août 1372, à Castle Bytham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Alice de Driby, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Grey. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 août 1451, à Codnor, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Basset am 1. August 1372 in Castle Bytham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote 57 und ihre Mutter Alice de Driby 32. Sie hat Richard Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. August 1451 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Codnor, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Basset è nata il il 1 agosto 1372 nel Castle Bytham, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote, aveva 57 anni e sua madre, Alice de Driby, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Richard Grey. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 6 agosto 1451, nel Codnor, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bassetが1372年8月1日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアカストル ブイサムで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcoteは57歳，母Alice de Dribyは32歳であった。Richard Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1451年8月6日にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアコドノーで79歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Basset(이)가 1372년 8월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 카스틀 비섬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Driby(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Richard Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1451년 8월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 코드너에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Basset nasceu em 1 de agosto de 1372, em Castle Bytham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Driby, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Grey. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de agosto de 1451, em Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Basset родилась 1 августа 1372 г. в местности кастл битам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Driby, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Grey. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 6 августа 1451 г. в местности коднор, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Richard Grey. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 6 de agosto de 1451, en Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
